notes: A broad quality release. Statements now export fully to Excel — Statement of Changes in Funds, Cash Flow (with the movements behind each figure), Notes to the Accounts, Donor/Project and Fund Balances all mirror the printed statements, and the VAT return carries your letterhead and GRA TIN. Live exchange rates are back: one click fetches Bank of Ghana rates (with an automatic fallback source), labelled and dated; you still confirm every rate before it is used. Payments under GHS 2,000 with withholding selected now show an Act 896 reminder — advisory only, nothing changes unless you change it. The withholding screen's All WHT view now lets you tick and remit pending deductions directly. Forms are cleaner (aligned fields, small info icons for guidance), amounts line up properly in tables and payslips, and printed documents no longer carry on-screen buttons or banners. Under the hood: passwords are hashed with a stronger standard (upgraded silently at your next sign-in), off-site backups gain integrity checksums, the app now checks after every posting that each sub-ledger still agrees with its ledger account and warns immediately if not, and it warns if the ledger files are moved between computers. Two-operator timing clashes in petty-cash reimbursement and staff-advance retirement can no longer double-post.
